item.title_tr: LOTUS European Bath, Shampoo, and Facial Towels 100% Soft, Absorbent Cotton for Home, Spa, Hotel
item.description_tr:
🌟 LotusTowel Cotton Towel
Product Name: Cotton Towel
Brand: LotusTowel
Material: High quality Cotton
📌 Product specifications (+-5%)
Large Towel: 70x140cm - 420g (Normal Type) - 480g (VIP Type)
Large Towel: 60x120cm - 300g (Normal Type) - 360g (VIP Type)
Medium Towel: 50x100cm - 200g (Normal Type) - 240g (VIP Type)
Shampoo: 40x80cm - 130g (Normal Type) - 160g (VIP Type)
Face Towel: 35x50cm - 60g (Normal Type) - 80g (VIP Type)
📌 Product characteristics
The towel is soft and smooth, polyester-free, 300% more absorbent than normal towels!
Completely dyed technology, no fading, safe for sensitive skin
No smell, no ruffles, no cotton when used
📌 Instructions for use and maintenance
Wash gently for the first time before use
Store in a cool, dry place
Do not use strong detergents
📌 Warranty policy
Return within 7 days if the towel is defective, faded, not as absorbent as advertised.

paragraph_list.text: The towel is soft and smooth, polyester-free, 300% more absorbent than normal towels!
